name: Budget
description: Gmail-sourced budget dashboard. Pulls transaction emails through a local AI pipeline into a per-workspace SQLite ledger.

commands.title: Open Overview
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget overview / dashboard view.

commands.title: Open Recurring
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget recurring transactions view.

commands.title: Open Cash Flow
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget cash flow view.

commands.title: Open Rules
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget categorization rules view.

commands.title: Open Review Queue
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget review queue (transactions awaiting categorization).

commands.title: Open Sync Log
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget Gmail sync log view.

commands.title: Open Import / Export
commands.aiDescription: Open the Budget import / export view.

commands.title: Sync Gmail Transactions
commands.aiDescription: Sync new transactions from Gmail into the budget ledger.

commands.title: Reprocess History (apply rules to old rows)
commands.aiDescription: Reapply categorization rules to the full transaction history.

commands.title: Export Transactions to CSV
commands.aiDescription: Export the budget transactions to a CSV file (user picks destination).

budget.gmailMcpServerId.description: The MCP server ID under which the Gmail server is registered (Settings → MCP Servers → row id). Defaults to 'gmail' to match the bundled catalog entry. If you renamed the row on install, update this to match exactly.

budget.gmailQuery.default: from:(chase.com OR americanexpress.com OR capitalone.com OR discover.com OR citibank.com OR wellsfargo.com OR bankofamerica.com OR usbank.com)
budget.gmailQuery.description: Gmail search filter applied to every sync. Defaults cover major US issuers. Use Gmail search syntax (e.g. add OR clauses for additional banks).

budget.syncStartDays.description: On the very first sync (no cursor yet), import mail received within this many days.

budget.preferredModelId.description: Model id to use for classification/extraction/categorization. Empty = first model returned by api.lm.getModels().

budget.syncIntervalMinutes.description: How often the scheduled cron job runs `budget.sync`. Disable from the Scheduled Jobs UI to turn off automatic sync.
